title: Studying Abroad in Copenhagen, Denmark
body: Please remember that Copenhagen isn't the only thing to Denmark. The culture is different for example in Jylland, and even in the rest of Sjælland

title: Tour Furman University in 60 Seconds
body: Love Furman (my alma mater) but dislike portrait videos.  Next time try turning your phone camera 90 degrees for a much more visually informative experience.  I just watched your video on our TV.  Sixty percent of our TV was not being used.  Using 'Landscape' can change all of that.  Landscape ensures that all of the pixels of a medium like TV get used.  Just saying.  :-)
author: @randycraig978

title: Road Trip! FURMAN UNIVERSITY College Tour
body: I love Furman!  I use to run up there. They are so gracious to open their campus to the public to enjoy. My in laws both went to Furman so we’ve enjoyed lots of football games too.
author: @bellesofcotton8252

title: Road Trip! FURMAN UNIVERSITY College Tour
body: Oh Furman is such a beautiful campus. So glad y’all got to tour it. That’s so cute you remembered eddies proposal to Mitzi. She’ll get a kick out of it. Great tour. 😘😘😘
author: @PixieDustPeaches

title: Road Trip! FURMAN UNIVERSITY College Tour
body: I'm enjoying your college tour videos.  We're from Illinois, so we're gong to have to be pretty selective about southern schools we actually visit because it will require a major trip and lots of planning, so thanks for sharing colleges Skylan is considering.  My son would like to attend a college in the south, and I appreciate a mother's point of view because you and I seem to be interested in the same things when looking at schools.  So many videos are from the student's perspective, so I appreciate the parent's point of view.
author: @lindavolker3692
